allow: Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "cd /opt/bambuhelper && git pull && sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sudo systemctl is-active bambuhelper")
Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo journalctl -u bambuhelper --since ''1 hour ago'' 2>&1 | grep -i ''hms\\|0500''")
Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sleep 1 && sudo systemctl status bambuhelper --no-pager | tail -3")

Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/state | python3 -c ''import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p[""id""], p.get\(""has_dual_nozzle""\), p.get\(""nozzle_type""\), p.get\(""nozzle_temp_l""\), p.get\(""nozzle_temp_r""\)\) for p in d]''")

Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo cp /tmp/bambu_server.py /opt/bambuhelper/bambu_server.py && sudo cp /tmp/dashboard.html /opt/bambuhelper/dashboard.html && sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sleep 1 && sudo systemctl status bambuhelper --no-pager | tail -3")

Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/state | python3 -c ''import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p[""id""], ""dual:"", p.get\(""has_dual_nozzle""\), ""type:"", p.get\(""nozzle_type""\)\) for p in d]''")
Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo cp /opt/bambuhelper/dashboard.html /opt/bambuhelper/templates/dashboard.html && sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sleep 1 && echo done")

Bash(scp "d:/OneDrive - FDS/Documents/Surface RT Linux/BambuHelper-SurfaceRT/bambu_server.py" "d:/OneDrive - FDS/Documents/Surface RT Linux/BambuHelper-SurfaceRT/templates/dashboard.html" rjones@10.0.100.208:/tmp/)

Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo cp /tmp/bambu_server.py /opt/bambuhelper/bambu_server.py && sudo cp /tmp/dashboard.html /opt/bambuhelper/templates/dashboard.html && sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sleep 3 && systemctl is-active bambuhelper")
Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "sudo cp /tmp/dashboard.html /opt/bambuhelper/templates/dashboard.html && sudo systemctl restart bambuhelper && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active bambuhelper")

Bash(ssh rjones@10.0.100.208 "curl -s http://localhost:5000/debug | python3 -c ""import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p1=[p for p in d.get\(''printers'',[]\) if ''H2D'' in p.get\(''name'',''''\)]; p=p1[0] if p1 else {}; print\(''nozzle_temp:'', p.get\(''nozzle_temp''\)\); print\(''nozzle_temp_active:'', p.get\(''nozzle_temp_active''\)\); print\(''nozzle_target_active:'', p.get\(''nozzle_target_active''\)\); print\(''nozzle_temp_l:'', p.get\(''nozzle_temp_l''\)\); print\(''nozzle_temp_r:'', p.get\(''nozzle_temp_r''\)\); print\(''nozzle_target_l:'', p.get\(''nozzle_target_l''\)\); print\(''nozzle_target_r:'', p.get\(''nozzle_target_r''\)\); print\(''nozzle_active_side:'', p.get\(''nozzle_active_side''\)\); print\(''has_dual_nozzle:'', p.get\(''has_dual_nozzle''\)\); print\(''ams_active_id:'', p.get\(''ams_active_id''\)\)""")
